spellbook_magic_missile.name: Spellbook of Magic Missile
spellbook_magic_missile.lore: The first spell every apprentice masters. An unerring dart of pure magical force.

spellbook_sleep.name: Spellbook of Sleep
spellbook_sleep.lore: A gentle enchantment that sends living creatures into sudden slumber.

spellbook_light.name: Spellbook of Light
spellbook_light.lore: Banishes shadows. Simple, essential, and often the spell that saves lives.

spellbook_shield.name: Spellbook of Magic Shield
spellbook_shield.lore: A shimmering barrier that halves physical blows and improves your defenses.

spellbook_fire_bolt.name: Spellbook of Fire Bolt
spellbook_fire_bolt.lore: A bolt of concentrated flame. Dangerous to fire-resistant creatures, devastating to the rest.

spellbook_haste.name: Spellbook of Haste
spellbook_haste.lore: Accelerates your body to superhuman speed, granting a free second action each turn.

spellbook_heal.name: Spellbook of Heal
spellbook_heal.lore: Channels restorative energy. The deeper the mastery, the more HP recovered.

spellbook_invisibility.name: Spellbook of Invisibility
spellbook_invisibility.lore: Bends light around you. Invisibility is not invulnerability, but it is close.

spellbook_lightning.name: Spellbook of Chain Lightning
spellbook_lightning.lore: Lightning that arcs between targets, chaining to nearby enemies.

spellbook_confusion.name: Spellbook of Confusion
spellbook_confusion.lore: Scrambles a monster's senses. A confused enemy attacks randomly and loses coordination.

spellbook_displacement.name: Spellbook of Displacement
spellbook_displacement.lore: Projects a false image of you, causing attackers to strike at empty air 30% of the time.

spellbook_ice_storm.name: Spellbook of Ice Storm
spellbook_ice_storm.lore: Freezing shards blast every visible monster. A battlefield-clearing spell.

spellbook_paralyze.name: Spellbook of Paralysis
spellbook_paralyze.lore: Locks a monster in magical stasis. Even the most fearsome creatures cannot move while paralyzed.

necronomicon.name: The Necronomicon
necronomicon.unidentified_name: a book bound in human flesh
necronomicon.lore: Naturom Demonto — roughly translated, the Book of the Dead. Bound in human flesh and inked in blood, this ancient Sumerian text contains funeral incantations, demon resurrection passages, and prophecies. It is NOT to be read aloud. Seriously. Don't.

spellbook_cleanse.name: Spellbook of Cleanse
spellbook_cleanse.lore: A healer's primer on purification magic. The spells within were developed by temple physicians who needed to cure plague victims without touching them. One incantation removes any single affliction — poison, paralysis, disease, curse. Simple, reliable, life-saving.

spellbook_empower.name: Spellbook of Empower
spellbook_empower.lore: A war-mage's secret: channel arcane energy into a physical weapon for a single devastating strike. The technique was perfected by the battlemages of Carthage, who could shatter siege gates with an empowered hammer blow. Cast it, then strike — the next melee attack deals triple damage.

spellbook_smite.name: Spellbook of Smite
spellbook_smite.lore: The word of divine judgment, written in letters of fire. This spell calls down holy wrath upon a single target, bypassing all mortal resistances. It was said to be the weapon of archangels against demons — pure righteous force that recognizes no shield, no armor, no magical ward.

spellbook_summon_guardian.name: Spellbook of Summon Guardian
spellbook_summon_guardian.lore: Druids of the ancient groves could call spirit-beasts from the aether to fight alongside them. The guardian manifests for a brief time — drawn from the essence of creatures the caster has encountered. It fights, it protects, and then it fades. But in those precious moments, you are not alone.

spellbook_meteor.name: Spellbook of Meteor
spellbook_meteor.lore: The most destructive evocation known to mortal spellcraft. A fragment of a dying star is summoned from the void and hurled into the material plane. Everything in sight burns. The original text was recovered from the Library of Alexandria — one of the few scrolls to survive the fire, ironically.

spellbook_time_freeze.name: Spellbook of Time Freeze
spellbook_time_freeze.lore: To freeze time itself — this is the ambition that drove the greatest chronomancers to madness. The spell does not stop time; it suspends causality for all beings except the caster. For five heartbeats, nothing moves, nothing thinks, nothing acts. Use it to flee, to heal, to strike. It is the ultimate emergency — and finding this book may be the rarest stroke of fortune in your entire journey.

spellbook_fireball.name: Spellbook of Fireball
spellbook_fireball.lore: The quintessential battle mage's spell. A rolling sphere of flame engulfs everything in sight.
spellbook_fireball.sprite_desc: A leather-bound spellbook with flame motifs and glowing orange runes on a charred cover

spellbook_slow.name: Spellbook of Slow Monster
spellbook_slow.lore: Temporal magic that saps the speed from a creature, leaving it sluggish and vulnerable.
spellbook_slow.sprite_desc: A slate-blue spellbook with a stylized hourglass embossed in silver on the cover

spellbook_knock.name: Spellbook of Knock
spellbook_knock.lore: A locksmith's nightmare. This spell opens any mundane lock with a burst of arcane force.
spellbook_knock.sprite_desc: A brass-bound spellbook with a skeleton key motif on the cover and glowing keyhole symbol

spellbook_teleport_away.name: Spellbook of Teleport Away
spellbook_teleport_away.lore: Spatial magic that hurls a creature to a random location on the level. Or yourself, if you prefer.
spellbook_teleport_away.sprite_desc: A violet spellbook with swirling portal imagery and silver spatial runes on the cover

spellbook_acid_arrow.name: Spellbook of Acid Arrow
spellbook_acid_arrow.lore: An arrow of pure acid that burns on impact and continues to corrode flesh over time.
spellbook_acid_arrow.sprite_desc: A green-tinged spellbook with acid-etched designs and bubbling liquid trapped in the cover

spellbook_drain_life.name: Spellbook of Drain Life
spellbook_drain_life.lore: Vampiric magic that tears life force from a creature and channels it into the caster.
spellbook_drain_life.sprite_desc: A dark crimson spellbook with veins of red light pulsing across its leather binding

spellbook_fear.name: Spellbook of Fear
spellbook_fear.lore: Projects raw terror into a creature's mind, sending it fleeing in panic.
spellbook_fear.sprite_desc: A shadowy purple spellbook with a screaming face embossed in tarnished silver on the cover

spellbook_detect.name: Spellbook of Detect Monsters
spellbook_detect.lore: Expands the caster's awareness to sense every living creature on the level.
spellbook_detect.sprite_desc: A teal spellbook with an open eye symbol radiating concentric circles on the cover

spellbook_polymorph.name: Spellbook of Polymorph
spellbook_polymorph.lore: Warps reality around a creature, transforming it into something else entirely. Results vary.
spellbook_polymorph.sprite_desc: An iridescent spellbook whose cover shifts between animal shapes when viewed from different angles

spellbook_reflect.name: Spellbook of Reflect
spellbook_reflect.lore: Creates a shimmering aura that bounces hostile magic and status effects back at their source.
spellbook_reflect.sprite_desc: A silver-white spellbook with a polished mirror fragment set into the center of its cover

spellbook_disintegrate.name: Spellbook of Disintegrate
spellbook_disintegrate.lore: The ultimate destruction spell. Reduces a creature to dust with a single word of power.
spellbook_disintegrate.sprite_desc: A black obsidian spellbook with cracks of molten red light and ash drifting from its pages
